title: Delay compensation claims: 1 April 2026 to 25 July 2026 (Periods 1 to 4)
text: Quarterly statistics containing data on the volume of delay compensation claims made by passengers on rail services within Great Britain and how effectively train operating companies processed these.
description: Quarterly statistics containing data on the volume of delay compensation claims made by passengers on rail services within Great Britain and how effectively train operating companies processed these.
